AI-Powered Furniture Discovery

Snap your room. Find your furniture.

Upload any room photo and our AI instantly identifies furniture styles, then searches IKEA, Wayfair, West Elm and more to find your perfect match.

Drop your room photo here

JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC · Max 5 MB

🔍 AI Vision Detection
🏪 4 Stores Crawled
📐 AR Preview
💳 Stripe Checkout

How it works

01

Upload a Room Photo

Any room photo from your phone or computer. Our AI handles the rest.

02

AI Detects Furniture

Google Vision API identifies furniture type, style, and color palette in seconds.

03

Shop Matching Products

Browse curated matches from top stores with AR preview and one-click Stripe checkout.

© 2026 VibeCart. Powered by AI Vision + Stripe.
